ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the agricultural commodity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commodity */,
  "commodity_type" TEXT /* Type of commodity */,
  "commodity_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the commodity */,
  "commodity_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variety */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity this variety belongs to */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the variety */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variety */,
  "variety_category" TEXT /* Category of the variety */,
  "variety_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the variety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_varieties_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state this district belongs to */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "district_code" TEXT /* Code of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district this market belongs to */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market */,
  "market_address" TEXT /* Address of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variety */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival at the market */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "min_price" TEXT /* Minimum price of the commodity */,
  "max_price" TEXT /* Maximum price of the commodity */,
  "avg_price" TEXT /* Average price of the commodity */,
  "arrival_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the commodity that arrived */,
  "price_variance" REAL /* Variance in prices */,
  "telegram_alert" TEXT /* Telegram alert message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variety */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for notifications */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user preference */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the alert message */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_preference_id FOREIGN KEY ("preference_id") REFERENCES user_preferences ("preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variety */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "policy_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was implemented */,
  "policy_content" TEXT /* Content of the policy */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact analysis */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date the impact was analyzed */,
  "impact_content" TEXT /* Content of the impact analysis */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Score of the impact */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_impact_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_impact_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_impact_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholder_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder engagement */,
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stakeholder */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement */,
  "engagement_content" TEXT /* Content of the engagement */,
  "engagement_method" TEXT /* Method of engagement */,
  "engagement_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id")
)
column_names: Unit of measurement for the commodity
ID of the commodity this variety belongs to
ID of the state this district belongs to
Area of the district in square kilometers
ID of the district this market belongs to
Unique identifier for each price data entry
Date of arrival at the market
